Localization.Description: Startup of "tscon" for RDP session hijacking is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An attempt to hijack RDP session {reason} as the user {subject.account.name} with the Microsoft Windows "tscon" utility is detected on host {event_src.host}
An attempt to hijack RDP session {reason} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} with the Microsoft Windows "tscon" utility is detected on host {event_src.host}
